include.name: PGP_294_successfulSeamlessCCPromoTxn
PGP_295_successfulSeamlessNBPromoTxn
PGP_296_successfulSeamlessNBPromoTxnDiscountType
PGP_297_successfulSeamlessNBPromoTxn
PGP_298_successfulSeamlessCCPromoTxn
PGP_299_successfulSeamlessCCPromoTxn
test body.simplifiedPaymentOffers is returned in response when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers is passed in Init Txn API
test body.simplifiedPaymentOffers is not returned in response when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers is not passed in Init Txn API
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers is not provided
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = null
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = ''
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers equals random value
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = true given merchant does not have promos configured
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = true given merchant has promos configured and body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.promoCode is not passed in Initiate Txn API
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = true given merchant has promos configured and body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.promoCode equals valid promo in Initiate Txn API
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = true given merchant has promos configured and body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.promoCode equals invalid promo in Initiate Txn API
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = false given merchant has promos configured
test when body.applyPaymentOffer is not provided
test when body.applyPaymentOffer = null
test when body.applyPaymentOffer = ''
test when body.applyPaymentOffer equals random value
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.applyAvailablePromo = true in Initiate Txn API and body.applyPaymentOffer = true in FetchPayOptions API
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.applyAvailablePromo = false in Initiate Txn API and body.applyPaymentOffer = true in FetchPayOptions API
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.applyAvailablePromo = true in Initiate Txn API and body.applyPaymentOffer = false in FetchPayOptions API
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.applyAvailablePromo = false in Initiate Txn API and body.applyPaymentOffer = false in FetchPayOptions API
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.promoCode is not passed in Initiate Txn API
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.promoCode equals valid promo code in Initiate Txn API
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.promoCode equals invalid promo code in Initiate Txn API
test that Bulk Promo API is applied successfully when user has saved cards
test that Bulk Promo API is applied successfully when merchant has saved cards
test body.simplifiedPaymentOffers is returned in response when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers is passed in Init Txn API
test body.simplifiedPaymentOffers is not returned in response when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers is not passed in Init Txn API
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers is not provided
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = null
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = ''
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers equals random value
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = true given merchant does not have promos configured
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = true given merchant has promos configured and body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.promoCode is not passed in Initiate Txn API
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = true given merchant has promos configured and body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.promoCode equals valid promo in Initiate Txn API
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = true given merchant has promos configured and body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.promoCode equals invalid promo in Initiate Txn API
test when body.fetchAllPaymentOffers = false given merchant has promos configured
test when body.applyPaymentOffer is not provided
test when body.applyPaymentOffer = null
test when body.applyPaymentOffer = ''
test when body.applyPaymentOffer equals random value
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.applyAvailablePromo = true in Initiate Txn API and body.applyPaymentOffer = true in FetchPayOptions API
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.applyAvailablePromo = false in Initiate Txn API and body.applyPaymentOffer = true in FetchPayOptions API
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.applyAvailablePromo = true in Initiate Txn API and body.applyPaymentOffer = false in FetchPayOptions API
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.applyAvailablePromo = false in Initiate Txn API and body.applyPaymentOffer = false in FetchPayOptions API
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.promoCode is not passed in Initiate Txn API
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.promoCode equals valid promo code in Initiate Txn API
test when body.simplifiedPaymentOffers.promoCode equals invalid promo code in Initiate Txn API
test that Bulk Promo API is applied successfully when user has saved cards
test that Bulk Promo API is applied successfully when merchant has saved cards

parameter.name: userAgent
parameter.value: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 6_0 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/536.26 (KHTML,like Gecko) Version/6.0 Mobile/10A5376e Safari/8536.25

PGP_24050_verifyTxnwhenPromoNotAppliedandValidatePromoisTrueAddNPay

test.name: PGP-20495 - Promo - SimpliFiedPaymentOffers Tests for native

include.name: ValidateFailureTxnUsingPaymentandSimplifiedoffers
ValidateSuccessTxnUsingSpecificCashbackPromoInNewFlow
ValidateSuccessTxnUsingSpecificDiscountPromoInNewFlow
ValidateSuccessTxnUsingAnyAvailablePromoInNewFlow
ValidateMerchantRetryNotAllowedUsingAnyAvailablePromoInNewFlow
ValidateFailureTxnUsingInvalidPromoWithValidatePromoTrueInNewFlow
ValidateSuccessTxnUsingInvalidPromoWithValidatePromoFalseInNewFlow
ValidateFailureTxnUsingNullPromoParamsInNewFlow

test.name: PGP-20495 - Promo - SimpliFiedPaymentOffers Tests for Native Plus

include.name: ValidateFailureTxnUsingPaymentandSimplifiedoffers
ValidateSuccessTxnUsingSpecificCashbackPromoInNewFlow

ValidateSuccessTxnUsingInvalidPromoWithValidatePromoFalseInNewFlow

verifySuccessfulPromoTxn
